lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and visible damage to both the exterior and interior. It requires major repairs to be roadworthy.
Fair condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The interior and exterior show no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical and electrical systems are in perfect working order.

Step into a fantastic ride that's been truly cared for! This car is in good condition, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience that you can count on. It's clean, well-maintained, and shows only the minor signs of regular use that you'd expect from a dependable vehicle. Perfect for commutes or weekend getaways, it's ready to bring joy to its next owner!

This vehicle is in fair condition and is priced to reflect its current state. It remains a functional and reliable daily driver, but it does show visible signs of its age and mileage. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor door dings, while the interior upholstery shows significant wear and some staining. Mechanically, the car starts and runs well, though the suspension is becoming soft and there are minor oil leaks that will eventually require attention. This is a solid choice for a buyer who needs a working vehicle and is comfortable performing some upcoming maintenance and minor cosmetic repairs.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, truly a showroom-quality example. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original deep luster without a single chip, scratch, or swirl mark. Inside, the interior is pristine; the leather remains supple and the carpets are spotless, showing no signs of use. Every mechanical and electronic component functions perfectly, reflecting the meticulous care and maintenance this car has received. This is an exceptional opportunity to own a vehicle that remains in like-new condition in every measurable way.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies engineering excellence and operational reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it adheres to our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a refined exterior finish, this vehicle offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning buyer. It represents an exceptional value proposition for those seeking a balance of luxury, durability, and proven mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s looking for a new home! It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. It drives like a dream and is ready for many more adventures. If you’re looking for a great, dependable car that’s been well-loved, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS variable valve timing. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and an M-Variable limited-slip differential. Mechanically sound, this example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including subframe reinforcement and VANOS solenoid servicing. The chassis remains taut with refreshed bushings and factory-spec damping, providing exceptional turn-in and high-speed stability. While the aesthetics reflect its driver-focused history, the powertrain is robust, free of rod bearing issues, and pulls hard to the 8,000 RPM redline.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Regular service history. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine with only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the premium upholstery remains supple and free of tears, complemented by a smoke-free cabin and a fully functional infotainment suite. Mechanically, the car is sound; the engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the suspension absorbs road imperfections with ease. Recent service records show a proactive approach to maintenance, including a fresh oil change and a multi-point inspection. With its clean title and impressive curb appeal, this car is ready for its next journey.

Used car in good condition. Maintenance up to date. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This vehicle is a remarkable example of pride in ownership, offering a perfect balance of performance and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine from being garage-kept, with only minor stone chips consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin remains smoke-free and inviting; the upholstery is supple with minimal wear, and all technological features—from the premium sound system to the climate control—function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule. It delivers a smooth, responsive drive with crisp gear shifts and steady handling. This is a reliable, well-maintained machine that looks as good in a driveway as it feels on the open road. Complete service records are available to provide full confidence in its history.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and aesthetic refinement. We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this model demonstrates consistent reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic. It stands as a testament to disciplined ownership and remains an exemplary choice for the sophisticated driver seeking a high-caliber automotive investment.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that's ready to hit the road? I'm selling my car and it's been such a joy to drive! It’s in solid shape, runs smooth, and has clearly been well-loved. Whether you're commuting or planning a weekend getaway, this beauty is ready for you. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love it!

This 996.2-generation Carrera features the 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six engine equipped with VarioCam Plus, delivering a linear power band and a distinct boxer growl. The M96 powerplant is mated to a crisp G96 6-speed manual transaxle, ensuring an engaging driver-centric experience. Mechanically sound, the vehicle has undergone an IMS bearing retrofit and a rear main seal replacement to ensure long-term reliability. The chassis retains its precision with a multi-link rear suspension and McPherson struts, while the braking system utilizes four-piston monobloc calipers over cross-drilled ventilated rotors for superior heat dissipation. The exterior maintains excellent aerodynamic integrity, showing only minor cosmetic wear consistent with spirited road use. This is a well-sorted example with a clean rev report, ready for the next enthusiast to exploit its 7,300 RPM redline.
Well-maintained vehicle in good condition. Clean title. Regularly serviced. Reliable performance. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and remains in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior paint retains a deep gloss, with only the minor, expected road wear consistent with careful ownership. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and strong, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule and recent fluid changes. The interior is a highlight—smoke-free, with the premium upholstery showing minimal wear and all electronic features, including the infotainment and climate control, functioning perfectly. You'll find the ride quality is firm yet comfortable, thanks to a healthy set of tires and a well-sorted suspension. This is a reliable, high-performing car that balances luxury with everyday practicality. It’s ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it exhibits consistent mechanical reliability alongside a well-preserved interior and exterior. A standout example within its class, this automobile offers a refined driving experience and remains in commendable condition for its age and mileage.
